task_completion.description: The tab-separated text has been converted into a table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A clear grid/table structure is visible containing the attendee data (Last Name, First Name, Company, Email) instead of plain tab-separated text.

task_completion.description: The document page orientation is set to Landscape.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The page aspect ratio in the word processor is wider than it is tall, indicating Landscape mode.

task_completion.description: The header row text is formatted as bold.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text in the first row of the table appears thicker and darker (bold) compared to the data rows.

task_completion.description: The header row has a light gray background color.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The cells in the first row of the table have a light gray shading/fill color behind the text.

task_completion.description: The table data is sorted alphabetically by Company (primary) and Last Name (secondary).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The rows are grouped alphabetically by the Company column (e.g., Apex Logistics, BlueSky Aviation, Global Health Inc.), and within each company block, the Last Names are ordered alphabetically.

task_completion.description: The finalized document is saved as check_in_sheet.docx.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title bar of the word processor shows 'check_in_sheet.docx' or a file manager window shows the new file created in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the interface of a word processor being actively used, rather than terminal commands (like python scripts or pandoc) generating the document.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the application's formatting menus and dialogs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Menus, ribbons, or dialog boxes for 'Table Properties', 'Page Style', 'Sort', or 'Background Color' are visible in the trajectory, proving genuine interaction.

integrity.description: The agent used the provided raw attendee dataset without fabricating a new one.
integrity.visual_evidence: The table contains the expected columns (Last Name, First Name, Company, Email) and fictional companies (e.g., Apex Logistics, TechFlow Solutions) from the original raw document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input file is '/home/ga/Documents/attendee_export_raw.docx' and the output file must be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/check_in_sheet.docx'. The table must have exactly 4 columns. The header row must be bold with a light gray background. The data must be sorted primarily by Company (Column 3) and secondarily by Last Name (Column 1). Expected fictional companies in the dataset include Apex Logistics, TechFlow Solutions, Summit Financial, Global Health Inc., BlueSky Aviation, and Omega Structures.
